THE SHOP

Power your roster with premium currency packs, rare characters, and legendary gear — delivered fast.

Process

HOW IT WORKS

01
Choose Your Package

Browse the shop and pick the currency, bundle, or service you want.

02
Add to Cart & Checkout

Add items to your cart, enter your in-game username and email address.

03
Pay via Cash App

Send the exact total to $tsukaaa on Cash App. Include your in-game username in the Cash App note, then click "I Have Paid".

04
Receive Your Order

We'll contact you via email and deliver within 30 minutes to 1 hour.
